topics.label: Positive General Feedback
topics.description: Users express overall satisfaction and enjoyment with the app without specifying detailed features.

topics.label: Ease of Use
topics.description: Users find the app simple, intuitive, and easy to start using, especially for beginners.

topics.label: Technical Issues
topics.description: Users encounter problems like download failures or language barriers that hinder app usage.

topics.label: Negative Feedback on Monetization
topics.description: Users criticize the app for requiring membership or payment for features, or perceive it as a scam.

topics.label: Feature Requests
topics.description: Users suggest or request specific features such as landscape mode, video instructions, or animations.

topics.label: Convenience and Flexibility
topics.description: Users appreciate the app's convenience for fitting workouts into their schedule and having options for different levels.

topics.label: Effectiveness and Results
topics.description: Users report achieving fitness goals, losing weight, or seeing positive changes from using the app.

topics.label: Targeted for Women
topics.description: Users note the app is specifically designed for women's fitness needs.
